title: RBY's TNT
body:
# RBY'S TNT
> **Destroy EVERYTHING**

## 📝Features
**RBY'S TNT** is a dynamic datapack that introduces ALMOST **10 new explosive** variations, including 6 innovative TNT types and 2 dynamites. This pack **revolutionizes** the explosive experience in Minecraft by infusing it with a diverse array of explosive options. Whether you're unleashing **chaos** in creative mode or devising intricate mining strategies in survival, this pack ensures explosive encounters are anything but ordinary.

**RECIPES:**
[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1EEygIJ7E9gE7CKXcV4Q-nrd3YD__xUf0nARvbMnK284/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1EEygIJ7E9gE7CKXcV4Q-nrd3YD__xUf0nARvbMnK284/edit?usp=sharing)

![Lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/trx5nCJq/images/0f09e4c153075beb7466c021e16d5049bcddb3ed.png)

## Mod Support
Do you want a Custom Map (resourcepack, build, datapack, 3d models, etc) or see your favorite mod without particles or translate it? Request **anything** to be added [here](https://discord.com/invite/nW4qUhABw4).
